questions.question: Determine convergence: $\int_0^1 \frac{dx}{x\sqrt{x}}$.
questions.explanation: $\frac{1}{x\sqrt{x}} = x^{-3/2}$. Since $p=1.5 > 1$, the integral $\int_0^1 x^{-3/2}dx$ diverges.

questions.question: Evaluate $\int_0^1 \frac{\ln x}{\sqrt{x}} \, dx$.
questions.explanation: Integrate by parts: $\int_0^1 x^{-1/2}\ln x dx = \lim_{a\to0^+}[2\sqrt{x}\ln x - 4\sqrt{x}]_a^1 = (0 - 4) - (0 - 0) = -4$.

questions.question: Evaluate $\int_{-\infty}^0 x e^x \, dx$.
questions.explanation: Using integration by parts: $\int_{-\infty}^0 x e^x dx = \lim_{a\to-\infty}[e^x(x-1)]_a^0 = -1 - 0 = -1$.

questions.question: Determine convergence: $\int_1^\infty \frac{dx}{x\sqrt{x^2-1}}$.
questions.explanation: Let $x=\sec\theta$, $dx=\sec\theta\tan\theta d\theta$. The integral becomes $\int_0^{\pi/2} \frac{\sec\theta\tan\theta}{\sec\theta\tan\theta} d\theta = \int_0^{\pi/2} d\theta = \frac{\pi}{2}$.

questions.question: Determine if $\int_0^\infty \frac{\sin x}{x} \, dx$ converges.
questions.explanation: This is the Dirichlet integral. It converges to $\frac{\pi}{2}$, but $\int_0^\infty |\frac{\sin x}{x}| dx$ diverges, so it is conditionally convergent.

questions.question: Evaluate $\int_0^1 \frac{dx}{\sqrt{x(1-x)}}$.
questions.explanation: This corresponds to the Beta function $B(1/2,1/2)=\pi$. Alternatively, substitution $x=\sin^2\theta$ gives $\int_0^{\pi/2} 2d\theta = \pi$.

questions.question: Evaluate $\int_0^\infty e^{-x} \cos x \, dx$.
questions.explanation: Using integration by parts twice or Laplace transforms: $\int_0^\infty e^{-x}\cos x dx = \lim_{b\to\infty}[\frac{e^{-x}}{2}(\sin x - \cos x)]_0^b = 0 - (-\frac{1}{2}) = \frac{1}{2}$.

questions.question: Determine convergence: $\int_0^1 \frac{1}{x^p} \, dx$ for $p=1$ and $p=2$.
questions.explanation: $\int_0^1 x^{-1}dx$ diverges logarithmically; $\int_0^1 x^{-2}dx$ diverges as a $p>1$ type. Both diverge.

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You have mastered advanced improper integrals.
scoreMessages.70: Good job! Review the Dirichlet integral and Beta function.
scoreMessages.50: Keep practicing! Focus on substitution and integration by parts in improper settings.
scoreMessages.0: Review improper integrals and convergence tests.
